return(function(D,l,J,I,p,v,t,T,L,u,E,a,K,w,i,b,f,B,R,Q,o,z,M,F,H)u,i,a,E,o,R,T,Q,M,f,H,K,b,z,B,L,F,w=function(D)for G=-118493-(-118494),#D,491290+-491289 do w[D[G]]=(657527-657526)+w[D[G]]end if J
